DOMTextRun.characters: Click on a picture to play that match. After succesfully finishing four matches, a new round will be unlocked.
Welcome to the Tournament of Voltagen, where combat teams
of varying numbers compete against each other to determine
the most powerful being in the stick man universe.
The current champion has never been beaten.
Any combination of martial arts, street fighting and
superhuman powers can be used to
Running while executing a move will create a new attack. SlowMotion attacks
and the flipover throw (Press D when running) both use up battery points.
Press the Spacebar to start the fight
In Electricman2, you can save and load your progress using
Enter your code below and click "CONTINUE".
If you do not have a code, start a new game by clicking
If you have played this game before, remember to save your
game and write down the code.
DX Interactive - 5 Steps for a Mountain
You defeated the Replicants Enemies: 7 Skill Level: Easy Time taken: 109 seconds Health Remaining: 15 Score:100 Score:100

Next time you play this game, click on "LOAD" and enter this
code to continue from this point.

you'll have to start from the beginning again.
Click continue to re-enter your code.
